product_overview: Rebar is a bilingual (EN/ES) restaurant website for a bar/restaurant in Aguadilla, Puerto Rico, providing menu discovery, event promotion, contact and reservation forms, and an admin dashboard to manage menu and events. The site is built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, CSS Modules, and Supabase for persistence.
core_goals: Provide an engaging, mobile-responsive public site for customers to discover menu items, events, gallery, and restaurant information.
Enable customers to submit contact inquiries and reservation requests via forms with clear confirmation or error feedback.
Offer a simple admin dashboard for staff to create, edit, and manage menu items and events (CRUD) persisted to Supabase.
Support bilingual content (English/Spanish) with an easy language toggle and non-blocking UX.
Maintain fast page load and accessible navigation across devices.

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Persistent, responsive navigation bar with links to all main pages and a language toggle; shows a mobile hamburger menu on small screens.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View navigation header with links and language toggle -> Click Menu link -> See /menu page load
Navigate to /menu -> Click Events link in navigation -> See /events page load
Navigate to / -> Click language toggle button (EN/ES) -> See navigation labels and page text switch language
Resize browser to mobile width -> See hamburger menu icon appear -> Click hamburger menu -> See navigation links expand
Navigate to / -> Click Gallery link -> See /gallery page load
Navigate to / -> Click a nav link while on slow connection -> See link click but page fails to load -> See browser error or timeout message

features.name: Home Page
features.description: Landing page with hero, tagline, CTAs, previews of menu and events, and footer with contact and hours.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero section with restaurant name and tagline
Navigate to / -> Click Make a Reservation CTA -> See /reservations page load
Navigate to / -> Click View Menu CTA -> See /menu page load
Navigate to / -> Scroll through page sections -> See menu highlights and events preview
Navigate to / on slow network -> Hero background image fails to load -> See placeholder image or degraded layout

features.name: Menu Page
features.description: Full restaurant menu organized by categories showing item name, description, price, and thumbnail images with content fetched from Supabase.
user_flows: Navigate to /menu -> View category tabs or filters at top of page -> Click category tab Starters -> See list of Starters items
Navigate to /menu -> Scroll to an item -> View item name -> View item description -> View item price -> View item thumbnail image
Navigate to /menu -> Click Drinks category -> Browse cocktails list -> Click a thumbnail to view larger image (if supported) -> See image enlarge or modal
Navigate to /menu -> API returns data successfully -> See menu items populated from Supabase
Navigate to /menu -> API call to /api/menu fails or returns empty -> See user-friendly error message or empty state indicating menu unavailable

features.name: Events Page
features.description: List of upcoming events showing photo, title, date/time, description and optional external links; events fetched from Supabase.
user_flows: Navigate to /events -> See list of upcoming events with photo, title, and date
Navigate to /events -> Click event link for more info or tickets -> External ticket page opens or event detail appears
Navigate to /events -> Scroll to event item -> View event description and date/time
Navigate to /events -> Supabase returns events -> See events populated in listing
Navigate to /events -> Supabase returns no events or API error -> See friendly message 'No upcoming events' or error feedback

features.name: Gallery Page
features.description: Responsive photo gallery displaying restaurant interior, food, and events in a grid.
user_flows: Navigate to /gallery -> See responsive grid of images
Navigate to /gallery -> Click an image -> See larger view or modal of the image (if implemented)
Navigate to /gallery -> Scroll images on mobile -> Images load progressively
Navigate to /gallery -> Several images fail to load -> See image placeholders and option to retry

features.name: About Page
features.description: Page with restaurant story, background, and team/ownership information.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read restaurant story and team information
Navigate to /about -> Scroll to team section -> View team photos and bios
Navigate to /about -> Content fails to load due to data issue -> See fallback text or error notice advising to try again later

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Contact form for customers to submit inquiries; POSTs to /api/contact and provides success or error feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill Name field -> Fill Email field -> Fill Message field -> Click submit button -> See success message confirming submission
Navigate to /contact -> Fill Name field -> Leave Email field empty -> Fill Message field -> Click submit button -> See validation error for required Email field
Navigate to /contact -> Fill all fields -> Click submit button -> API /api/contact returns error -> See error message and option to retry

features.name: Reservations
features.description: Table reservation request form capturing name, email, date, time, party size and optional special requests; POSTs to /api/reservation.
user_flows: Navigate to /reservations -> Fill Name field -> Fill Email field -> Select Date -> Select Time -> Enter Party Size -> Click Submit reservation request -> See confirmation message
Navigate to /reservations -> Fill Name field -> Enter invalid Email format -> Click Submit reservation request -> See validation error for Email
Navigate to /reservations -> Fill all fields -> Click Submit reservation request -> API /api/reservation returns error -> See error message with retry instructions

features.name: Bilingual Support (EN/ES)
features.description: Language toggle in navigation switches UI text across all pages using JSON locale files and React Context.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click EN/ES language toggle in navigation -> See all visible page text switch to selected language
Navigate to /menu -> Click language toggle -> See menu item labels and category names update to selected language
Navigate to / -> Click language toggle -> Change language -> Refresh page -> See language preference persisted via React Context (no reload required)
Navigate to / -> Click language toggle when translation key missing -> See fallback text in default language and console/log entry for missing translation

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin panel at /admin (no auth currently) with sub-pages to manage Menu Items and Events (create, read, update, delete) persisted to Supabase.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click Menu Items card -> See /admin/menu page load with list of menu items

Navigate to /admin/menu -> Click Add New Item button -> Fill Name field -> Fill Description field -> Fill Price field -> Select Category -> Upload Image -> Click Save -> See new item appear in menu list
Navigate to /admin/menu -> Click an existing item -> Edit fields (e.g., change price) -> Click Save -> See updated values in list
Navigate to /admin/menu -> Click availability toggle on an item -> See item availability update in list
Navigate to /admin/menu -> Click Add New Item -> Leave required Price empty -> Click Save -> See validation error indicating missing Price
Navigate to /admin -> Click Events card -> See /admin/events page load with list of events
Navigate to /admin/events -> Click Create Event -> Fill Title field -> Select Date -> Fill Description -> Upload Image -> Click Save -> See new event in events list
Navigate to /admin/events -> Click Delete on an event -> Confirm deletion -> See event removed from list
Navigate to /admin -> Anyone accesses dashboard (no auth) -> See admin controls accessible (known limitation warning)

features.name: Hours Management (Planned)
features.description: Planned admin feature to manage business hours; currently not implemented and surfaced as Coming Soon in admin.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click Hours management area -> See message 'Hours management coming soon' or placeholder
Navigate to /admin -> Attempt to add or edit hours -> See disabled controls or no available UI -> Receive notice that feature is not implemented

routes.description: Home page with hero, about preview, and call-to-action sections
Full restaurant menu with food and drinks by category, with image thumbnails
About page with restaurant story and team info
Admin dashboard with links to manage menu and events
Admin page to add, edit, remove, and toggle availability of menu items
Admin page to create and manage upcoming events

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Responsive navigation header with language toggle (EN/ES) and links to all main pages
user_interactions: Click nav links to navigate between pages
Click language toggle button to switch between English and Spanish
View mobile hamburger menu on small screens

features.name: Home Page
features.description: Landing page with hero section, about preview, menu highlights, and reservation CTA
user_interactions: View hero section with restaurant name and tagline
Click CTA buttons (Make a Reservation, View Menu)

features.name: Menu Browsing
features.description: Display full restaurant menu organized by categories (food and drinks) with images
user_interactions: View item names, descriptions, and prices

features.name: Events Listing
features.description: Display upcoming events with photos, dates, and links
user_interactions: See event date, description, and photo
Click event link for tickets or more info

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Contact form that submits inquiries to the restaurant
user_interactions: See success or error message after submission

features.name: Bilingual Support
features.description: Language toggle between English and Spanish across all pages using JSON translation files
user_interactions: Click EN/ES language toggle in navigation
See all page text switch to selected language

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin panel to manage menu items and events
user_interactions: Click Menu Items card to manage menu
Click Events card to manage events
Add new menu items with name, description, price, category, and image
Create new events with title, date, description, and image

known_limitations.issue: Admin dashboard has no authentication — anyone can access /admin
known_limitations.impact: All admin management features are publicly accessible

known_limitations.issue: Hours management is not yet implemented
known_limitations.impact: Business hours cannot be updated via admin panel
